files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+name: Release Binaries
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - "v*"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      tag:
+        description: "Tag to build/upload (e.g. v0.2.0)"
+        required: true
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  build-macos:
+    runs-on: macos-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
+
+      - name: Setup Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version: "1.22.x"
+          check-latest: true
+
+      - name: Build universal macOS binary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          ref="${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-${{ inputs.tag }}}"
+          version="${ref#v}"
+          mkdir -p dist/pkg
+
+          CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/sag-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/sag
+          CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/sag-darwin-amd64 ./cmd/sag
+
+          lipo -create -output dist/sag dist/sag-darwin-arm64 dist/sag-darwin-amd64
+          rm -f dist/sag-darwin-arm64 dist/sag-darwin-amd64
+
+          cp README.md LICENSE dist/pkg/
+          cp dist/sag dist/pkg/
+          tar -C dist/pkg -czf "dist/sag_${version}_darwin_universal.tar.gz" sag README.md LICENSE
+
+          shasum -a 256 "dist/sag_${version}_darwin_universal.tar.gz" > "dist/sag_${version}_darwin_universal.tar.gz.sha256"
+
+      - name: Upload artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist-macos
+          path: dist/*
+
+  build-linux:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
+
+      - name: Setup Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version: "1.22.x"
+          check-latest: true
+
+      - name: Install system dependencies (audio)
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libasound2-dev
+
+      - name: Build linux amd64 binary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          ref="${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-${{ inputs.tag }}}"
+          version="${ref#v}"
+          mkdir -p dist/pkg
+
+          CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/sag ./cmd/sag
+
+          cp README.md LICENSE dist/pkg/
+          cp dist/sag dist/pkg/
+          tar -C dist/pkg -czf "dist/sag_${version}_linux_amd64.tar.gz" sag README.md LICENSE
+
+          sha256sum "dist/sag_${version}_linux_amd64.tar.gz" > "dist/sag_${version}_linux_amd64.tar.gz.sha256"
+
+      - name: Upload artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist-linux
+          path: dist/*
+
+  build-windows:
+    runs-on: windows-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
+
+      - name: Setup Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version: "1.22.x"
+          check-latest: true
+
+      - name: Build windows amd64 binary
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          $ref = "${env:GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
+          if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($ref)) { $ref = "${{ inputs.tag }}" }
+          $version = $ref.TrimStart("v")
+          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist\pkg | Out-Null
+
+          $env:CGO_ENABLED = "0"
+          $env:GOOS = "windows"
+          $env:GOARCH = "amd64"
+          go build -o dist\sag.exe .\cmd\sag
+
+          Copy-Item README.md dist\pkg\
+          Copy-Item LICENSE dist\pkg\
+          Copy-Item dist\sag.exe dist\pkg\
+
+          $zip = "dist\sag_${version}_windows_amd64.zip"
+          if (Test-Path $zip) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }
+          Compress-Archive -Path dist\pkg\sag.exe,dist\pkg\README.md,dist\pkg\LICENSE -DestinationPath $zip
+
+          (Get-FileHash $zip -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.ToLower() + "  " + (Split-Path $zip -Leaf) | Out-File -Encoding ascii "$zip.sha256"
+
+      - name: Upload artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist-windows
+          path: dist/*
+
+  upload:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [build-macos, build-linux, build-windows]
+    steps:
+      - name: Download artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: dist
+
+      - name: Flatten dist
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p out
+          find dist -type f -maxdepth 3 -print0 | xargs -0 -I{} cp {} out/
+
+          ref="${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-${{ inputs.tag }}}"
+          version="${ref#v}"
+          cat out/*.sha256 > "out/sag_${version}_checksums.txt"
+
+      - name: Upload release assets
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          tag_name: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref_name }}
+          files: out/*
+

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ Follow these steps for each release. Title GitHub releases as `sag <version>`.
 - Update `CHANGELOG.md` with a section for the new version.
 - Run the gates: `pnpm format && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build`.
 - Tag the release: `git tag -a v<version> -m "Release <version>"` after commits; push tags with `git push origin main --tags`.
+- GitHub Actions attaches binaries (macOS universal, Linux amd64, Windows amd64) to the GitHub release automatically (workflow: `Release Binaries`).
 - Create source archive (used by Homebrew):
   - `git archive --format=tar.gz --output /tmp/sag-<version>.tar.gz v<version>`
 - Update Homebrew tap formula (`../homebrew-tap/Formula/sag.rb`):
